name: RvPaws Cat Toy Interactive Rolly Polly Tumbler with Feather Toy + Led Ball + Rainbow Ball-Combo of 3 (Color May Vary)
description: Interactive Funny Pet Cat Toys Tumbler Ball Toy Funny Teaser Wobble Toy with Color Feather. Made of high quality plastic, decor with color feather, attracts your cat. A small bell in the tumbler ball, while the bell is not too loud and that would attract cats to it. Interactive wobbler toy, provides your cat with lots of fun. Nice bright colors and easy to store away if not in use. Material: Plastic, Product Size: 7*26cm, Product Weight: 50g, Package Dimensions: 12*20cm, Packing: Colorful Box
